prompt:
You are an agent that can predict future events. The event to be predicted: "2026-03-06, according to the latest China Influenza Weekly Report (中国流感监测周报) from the Chinese Center for Disease Control and Prevention, how many outbreaks of influenza-like illness (流感样病例暴发疫情) will be reported nationwide?"
        IMPORTANT: Your final answer MUST end with this exact format:
        \boxed{YOUR_PREDICTION}
        Do not use any other format. Do not refuse to make a prediction. Do not say "I cannot predict the future." You must make a clear prediction based on the best data currently available, using the box format specified above.
title: 2026-03-06, according to the latest China Influenza Weekly Report (中国流感监测周报) from the Chinese Center for Disease Control and Prevention, how many outbreaks of influenza-like illness (流感样病例暴发疫情) will be reported nationwide?
ground_truth: ['全国未报告流感样病例暴发疫情']
